title: More Armor Wood and Stone
description: More Armor is a mod that adds armor of different types such as wood and stone. PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS MOD IS IN BETA PHASE THERE MAY BE ERRORS CONTACT IN COMMENTS IF IT CAUSES PROBLEMS
body:
More Armor
Expand your defensive arsenal in Minecraft with More Armor! This mod adds new wood and stone armors, giving you more options to protect yourself while exploring and surviving. Each armor set is designed to integrate seamlessly and balanced with the base game, adding a fun and unique touch to your adventures.

⚡ Key Features:

New armors: wood and stone.

Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge.

Easy to install and use.

Adds variety without breaking the original gameplay experience.

💡 Note: The armor textures are simple, but the style and fun are guaranteed!

Take your defense to the next level and customize your style in the Minecraft world with More Armor.
